text: Result card dikhate hi Papa ki khamoshi ne mujhe itna dara diya hai ki Mukherjee Nagar aakar 'sarkari babu' banne ka saara sapna bikhar gaya. 12th board ke is back paper mein fail hone ke baad, dimaag bilkul sunn pad gaya hai aur bas aankhon se aansu beh rahe hain. Mujhe nahi pata aage UPSC ki coaching kaise hogi ya cutoff kaise nikalega, mera dil itna bhara hua hai ki saans lena mushkil ho raha hai.

Jab maine apna 12th ka result card joint family ke samne rakha, toh kisi ne taana nahi mara, bas wo sannata mujhe andar tak cheer gaya. Main pehle hi multi-year dropper hoon, socha tha marks improve karke PSC prep shuru karunga, par ab 'kuch nahi hoga mera' soch kar meri aatma kaanp rahi hai. Aage kya karna hai ya preparation kaise bachegi, ye sab sochne ki himmat nahi hai, bas rona ruk hi nahi raha.

Bapuji ne zameen girvi rakh kar coaching ki fees bhari thi, aur aaj 12th board ka fail result dekh kar unki chuppi ne mujhe zinda maar diya hai. Sharma ji ke bete ki state rank aayi hai aur yahan mere marks dekh kar mera dimaag completely blank ho chuka hai. Mujhe aage ki family investment ya future preparation ka kuch nahi sochna, bas ek ajeeb si ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur main dher ho gaya hoon.

12th board ka result papa ke haath mein diya toh unki silence ne hamari poori 'izzat' nilam hone ka ehsaas kara diya. Kota se wapas aakar UPSC ka sapna dekha tha, par is failure ne mujhe completely nichod diya hai aur main bas farsh par baith kar bilakh raha hoon. Mujhe next attempt ya dropper tag hatane ki koi baat nahi karni, mera rona rukne ka naam hi nahi le raha.

Papa ne result card dekha aur bina kuch bole kamre se chale gaye, us ek pal ne mujhe completely tod diya. Sarkari naukri ka khwab aur family ki itni investment ke baad 12th mein fail hona—mera dimaag fatne ko ho raha hai aur ek panic attack jaisa lag raha hai. Main aage admission ya coaching institute ki baat nahi soch pa raha, bas is khamoshi ne mujhe rone par majboor kar diya hai.
